sources.description: GitHub API repo metadata (stars, pushed_at, license) checked on 2026-02-25
GitHub API latest published release tag (v4.1.1 as of 2026-02-25)
Repository metadata (61,683 stars as of 2026-02-25, MIT)
14 skill definitions with SKILL.md frontmatter and structured markdown
Release notes include v4.3.1 (latest GitHub Release tag is v4.1.1)

summary: Superpowers is a 14-skill framework (61,683 stars as of 2026-02-25; plugin manifest v4.3.1) with strong skill-driven workflow enforcement
Core patterns: enforced TDD with delete-and-restart mandate, two-stage adversarial subagent review (spec compliance then code quality), verification-before-completion gates
Skills use hard gates, rationalization-prevention tables, and adversarial framing to prevent models from skipping process steps
Task granularity is 2-5 minute chunks (individual git commits), finer than cnogo's max-3-tasks-per-plan
Plugin architecture supports Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode via platform-specific manifests and install paths
recommendation: Port three key patterns into cnogo-native workflow controls: (1) verification-before-completion, (2) two-stage review with adversarial framing, (3) stricter TDD hard gates by hardening existing /tdd behavior (optionally with a dedicated skill + WORKFLOW.json toggle).
